name: Veal Chops in Spicy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Thick veal or lamb chops, fat trimmed
1 large Tomato, peeled, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions: Rose Hansen & Associates donated this recipe which is delicious served with saffron biryani, pilaf or couscous. Dredge chops in flour and brown on both sides in hot oil in a Dutch oven on medium heat. Remove chops from pot and keep warm. Saute onion, garlic and spices in pot over low heat, stirring when needed until onion is limp. Add broth and chops. Simmer covered until meat is tender, about 50 minutes. Remove chops, keep warm. Drain excess fat from pot, whisk in tomato paste and reduce liquid over high heat to 1 1/2 cups. Meanwhile, mix last 5 ingredients together. Pour hot sauce over meat, and serve with yogurt mixture around each chop.
